commits.message: chore: mark May 2 batch items 12-17 as visible
commits.author: Claude

panels.title: Mark May 2 batch items 12-17 as visible
panels.scene: A village marketplace. Empty stalls are suddenly filled with shining, perfect produce. Villagers are gasping and pointing.

panels.title: Mark May 2 batch items 12-17 as visible
panels.scene: A villager frantically trying to buy items 1-11, but they remain invisible and intangible. He stares in anguish as the knight looks on, stone-faced. The visible items 12-17 sparkle nearby.

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Items 1-11 will become visible in a later batch.

panels.title: Mark May 2 batch items 12-17 as visible
panels.scene: The king and queen, on their knees, weeping tears of joy, as a humble stall merchant presents a glowing turnip (item 15).

bubbles.speaker: Queen
bubbles.text: A visible turnip! Our kingdom is saved!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was always there, just not visible.

panels.title: One commit. 6 items made visible.
panels.scene: The knight sits on a crate looking bored. Villagers are erecting a small, slightly crooked shrine dedicated to the boolean 'true'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Let us forever celebrate the visibility!
